content: Recharts v3 is the practical default for React dashboards. SVG-based, component-based API (BarChart, LineChart, PieChart, AreaChart). v3 rewrote internal state, removed react-smooth dependency, enabled accessibilityLayer by default. Best for KPI dashboards, internal tools, product analytics — small to medium datasets. Simpler than Chart.js (no imperative canvas API). Does not require wrapping in Customized for custom components. Widely used in Next.js + shadcn/ui dashboard stacks.
